MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Mar-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Crisostomo Ibarra, Esq., T:415.981.5411, counsel for plaintiff, and moving party;
Lisa Nguyen, T:510.864.8888, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf, with Court Vietnamese Interpreter Quy Dao.

RULING: Hearing was held and the matter was discussed/argued. After hearing, the Court finding that there has been a breakdown of attorney-client relationS, ruled as follows:

COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF LISA NGUYEN'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is granted.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-24-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT HANNA HOANG'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Off calendar. Defendant Hoang failed to provide the requisite 80-day notice for serving this motion by mail and plaintiff has not waived the defect. (See Code Civ. Proc., 437c(a)(2); McMahon v. Superior Court (2003) 106 Cal.App.4th 112, 118; Robinson v. Woods (2008) 168 Cal.App.4th 1258, 1267.) In addition, defendant never properly filed the supporting evidence for this motion.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
